Here's the contents of your `~/.claude/` directory:

| Entry | Description |
|---|---|
| `.credentials.json` | Authentication credentials |
| `backups/` | Backup files |
| `cache/` | Cached data |
| `commands/` | Custom slash commands |
| `debug/` | Debug logs |
| `file-history/` | File edit history |
| `history.jsonl` | Conversation history |
| `ide/` | IDE integration config |
| `paste-cache/` | Clipboard paste cache |
| `plans/` | Saved plans |
| `plugins/` | Installed plugins |
| `projects/` | Project-specific configs |
| `session-env/` | Session environment data |
| `settings.json` | Global settings |
| `settings.local.json` | Local settings overrides |
| `shell-snapshots/` | Shell state snapshots |
| `skills/` | Custom skills |
| `stats-cache.json` | Usage statistics |
| `tasks/` | Task tracking data |
| `telemetry/` | Telemetry data |
| `todos/` | Todo lists |

content.text:
The `~/.agent/` directory contains one skill: **ui-ux-pro-max**, which has:

- **`SKILL.md`** — Skill definition/instructions
- **`data/`** — CSV reference data (styles, colors, typography, charts, icons, UX guidelines, stacks, etc.)
- **`scripts/`** — Python scripts (`core.py`, `design_system.py`, `search.py`)
- **`data/stacks/`** — Framework-specific data for 13 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, Flutter, SwiftUI, etc.)

What would you like to do with it?
